root_cause_analysis: DIAGNOSTIC INCONCLUSIVE: Insufficient data to determine root cause. A transient mechanical shock event occurred, producing Z-axis vibration exceeding the 45.0 m/s² threshold and triggering IMU clipping. However, no correlating changes in motor outputs (RCOU) or battery current (BAT.Curr) are observed at the time of the spike, ruling out propulsion-induced or power-delivery causes. The lack of additional sensor data (e.g., altitude, GPS, flight mode) prevents identifying the specific source of the impact (hard landing, propeller strike, debris, etc.).
actionable_fix: Inspect airframe for physical damage (propellers, arms, landing gear). Verify IMU isolation mount integrity. Review full flight log (including altitude and control mode) for context around the event.
